quality_highlights.note: Excellent structure: three distinct feature areas introduced up front, code examples for every pattern, explicit callout for unsupported safe-output types
Error lists offending scopes explicitly and provides a ready-to-copy corrected permissions block

single_file_improvements.issue: Consumer-grade language in run-started/run-success/run-failure messages; run-failure provides no actionable guidance
Line 83 references docs/safe-outputs.md (relative path) instead of a clickable URL
